metadata.description: BPMN 2.0 tooling for Claude Code: read, model, validate, and lint .bpmn process diagrams.

plugins.name: bpmn
plugins.description: Read, explain, create, and edit BPMN 2.0 process diagrams: non-destructive layout that preserves multi-diagram sub-process pages, full coverage (collaborations, swimlanes, sub-processes, data objects), validation, deep control-flow + structural linting, plus diff and find.
